lastCommit.message: map hover now prioritizes the largest pin (hovering near Forstford beats the Barsbalt Slopes; city > town > village > landmark > water > region, tie-broken by distance); full Home page redesign into intentional sections -- atmospheric hero with live stats and CTAs, a 'ways into the world' tool grid, a described 'browse the vault' grid, a 'help write the world' call-to-action panel, and recent pages, with the old dev-facing clutter removed; site-wide cohesion pass -- a footer on every page, type-index pages get descriptions and accent titles, home sections reveal on scroll
